rules.name: Business-as-Activity Domain Rule
rules.summary: Business means organized consequential activity within D, V, S and experience tests.

rules.name: Summary-First Operational Response Format Rule
rules.summary: Operational reports begin with status, UTC time, verdict, changes, tests, artifacts, rollback, and open questions.

rules.name: Anonymized Public Release Rule
rules.summary: Public packages must exclude personal data, private projects, and nonessential historical context.
